25
26 Man Tax: Ben Radcliffe
"How monotonously alike all the great tyrants and conquerors have been: how gloriously different are the saints." --C.S. Lewis So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This guy made a video bypassing a lock. The company responds by suing him, saying he’s tampering with them. So he orders a new one and bypasses it right out of the box.

item.title: This Doctor Turned Surgery Into a Superhero Moment
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: 14.5 years without personal space
item.description:
Our space comrade. This is a sad post. Don't read the captions anymore. Everything else is just pictures of the best cat. Spoilers in the next one.
This is Professor. He was the best cat.
He neither understood, nor respected, personal space.
I've gone my whole adult life without personal space. I got him when I turned 19 and was supporting myself.
I've wondered for years what it would be like to have personal space.
He's always just been there. Demanding attention.
Always in my space or by my side.
Look at them whiskers. So long.
He also didn't respect craft storage.
At all.
He loved his brother.
They were best friends.
No personal space. If you were going potty, he was there for you.
Just a sweet little dude. Look at them whiskers. So long. So tickly.
Sink cat.
He was always in or on my face.
He loved his aunt.
Sweet brothers.
Them eyebrows.
Sitting on the chair everyone saw in the early 2000s.
Snuggled with anyone who gave him attention.
Just wanted to make sure he was touching me while he slept.
There really was no personal space. It was all communal.
I remain surprised i caught this picture. He laid on my chest and stuck his nose directly on mine. The wrong movement could have ended the moment. There were very few movements available that weren't wrong.
If he could have cut me open and slept in my chest cavity, he would have.
It's been almost a week of personal space now. It sucks.
Those purple unicorns.
I had to give him a peaceful way out.
He was suffering.
He started spending more time hiding in the closet than he did next to me.
He stopped sleeping on the pillow next to mine.
He still came to bed.
I'm a side sleeper. He slept on top of the side I wasn't sleeping on.
His teef didn't fit in his mouf.
Man he loved those purple unicorns. He didn't care about any other toy.
They don't even look like unicorns.
Just a flat amorphous blob with a horn on the forehead and feathers on the butt.
He'd pull the feathers out. Once those were gone, it was no longer worthy of his love.
He guarded them jealously.
He was such a great cat.
I had to give him peace.
I had to accept that my personal space was going to be mine and only mine.
I had to make Vinnie an only cat.
He was hurting.
It was the right thing to do.
It was the best thing for him.
He was no longer eating dry food and started drooling and doing this weird jaw stretch and teeth clacking thing. He had been wheezing for a while, and the vet couldn't explain it. He was spending more time hiding in the closet than in my face demanding attention. Now he's gone, and my personal space is only mine. I love my buddy and would give up my personal space forever if I meant he was the one invading it. I did the right thing for him. He's gone now.
item.dc:creator: IsAHotdogASandwich

item.title: Unmeasurable corruption on full display
item.description: Front page edit.: To the Zionist cucks who are running down vote bots, just know that you are giving multiple people your personal information, and I just want to personally say thank you for putting out the effort. Y'all made this too easy. I don't think people quite understand how much money is in this fund for Trump's allies and the treasonous goons that support him. Everybody should be mad about this. https://youtube.com/shorts/ORA1bJCkSY8 --Side note: serving my nation was apparently the wrong choice. I tried to help my communities as well. And what do I get? Not a traitor slush fund. American infrastructure failing?- Who Cares
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Thanks for the support, Imgur!!!
item.description: I made my way into a three-year program for teacher leaders/administration, improving communication and collaboration skills, overall just being a better leader for colleagues. Plus they'll pay me $35k to complete the whole program. I'm so proud of me!!!
item.dc:creator: GratingBobShrillPants

item.title: My Sunday plans
item.description:
I got a text from the humane society CEO, Spencer (@AlabamaAnimalRescuer), on Wednesday that he needs a transport for an FIV cat about five hours away (FIV is like HIV in people, basically just a much-reduced immune system). The shelter in Monroe has kept her for a while but they just don’t have space for her anymore. Our GHHS has an entire building dedicated to FIV and FELV cats, so Spencer was ON the job and of course agreed
He connected me with the woman at the shelter
She can’t do the actual driving but she found someone to do it!
Luckily, the driver and I can both make this Sunday work.
So I guess I’m headed out at 10:00am Sunday!
And just LOOK at her. I mean…gorgeous. I can’t wait to meet her!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: One of the best slams I've ever heard
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: Bots are killing this place.
item.description: I just watched in real time my post go from having 40 plus points to 20 some points. These bots are getting out of control. Unfortunately for them, they don't realize that their information is very easily gatherable from here. So, got that going for us. The post- go check it out https://imgur.com/gallery/kRbI3qK
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered
